response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks explicit experience in IT architecture design, UML, and formal technical leadership at an executive level, and his German proficiency is only basic — a critical requirement for the role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact in GIS and developer tooling
Proven full-stack expertise across multiple languages and environments including Linux and Docker
Demonstrated mentorship and workshop leadership in testing, TDD, and web internals
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level
No clear evidence of UML expertise, IT architecture design, or formal project management leadership
Lacks documented experience in client advisory, compliance, or security risk management in consulting contexts
